symptom_vector: Database error with forced SQLException in DB connection method, causing inability to access cart storage, leading to runtime panic and code errors

reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [cartservice] (From Ground Truth instance field)
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [FailedPrecondition] in Log (From GT key_observations) - appears 481 times in cartservice-2 logs with 'Can't access cart storage'
Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [http.resp.status, 302] in Log (From GT key_observations) - frontend services show HTTP 500 errors in trace data
Step 4: Check Observation - Found keyword [request error] in Log (From GT key_observations) - appears in frontend logs with 'failed to add to cart' messages
Step 5: Check Observation - Found keyword [rpc, error] in Log (From GT key_observations) - appears in frontend logs with 'rpc error: code = FailedPrecondition'
Step 6: Check Observation - Found keyword [request, response] in Metric (From GT key_observations) - error_ratio and server_error_ratio metrics show abnormal increases
Step 7: Check Observation - Found keyword [pod_cpu_usage] in Metric (From GT key_observations) - cartservice-2 pod_cpu_usage p99 increased from 0.03 to 0.14 (change rate 1.2962)
Step 8: Check Observation - Found keyword [pod_processes] in Metric (From GT key_observations) - cartservice-1 and cartservice-2 pod_processes increased from 1.0 to 2.0 (p99 change rate 0.6667)
Step 9: Derive Root Cause - Based on pod_processes changes indicating pod restarts combined with database access errors, determined cause is [pod_processes] (From Ground Truth key_metrics)

critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'FailedPrecondition' in cartservice logs to confirm database access errors

critical_checks.instruction: Check trace data for HTTP status codes, particularly 500 errors in frontend services

critical_checks.expected_pattern: 'request error' appears in frontend logs with 'failed to add to cart: rpc error: code = FailedPrecondition desc = Can't access cart storage.'

critical_checks.expected_pattern: 'rpc error' appears in frontend logs with FailedPrecondition code and cart storage access issues
critical_checks.instruction: Search for 'rpc error' in logs to identify gRPC communication failures

critical_checks.expected_pattern: error_ratio and server_error_ratio metrics show significant increases (frontend-0: 0.0→0.66, frontend-1: 0.0→0.67, frontend-2: 0.0→0.72)
critical_checks.instruction: Check error_ratio and server_error_ratio metrics for abnormal increases during fault period

critical_checks.expected_pattern: cartservice-2 pod_cpu_usage p99 increased from 0.03 to 0.14 (change rate 1.2962)
critical_checks.instruction: Monitor pod_cpu_usage metric for cartservice instances, particularly p99 values

critical_checks.expected_pattern: cartservice-1 and cartservice-2 pod_processes increased from 1.0 to 2.0 (p99 change rate 0.6667)
critical_checks.instruction: Check pod_processes metric for cartservice instances to detect pod restarts
